Lyth 2026-03-03 2:40 PM
# Roblox Open Cloud Capabilities ## Universe | Method | Description | Scope(s) Required | |---|---|---| | `datastore(name, scope?)` | Factory — creates a `Datastore` instance | — | | `orderedDatastore(name, scope?)` | Factory — creates an `OrderedDatastore` instance | — | | `publishMessage(topic, message)` | Publish a message to a topic | `universe-messaging-service:publish` | | `banUser(userId, options?)` | Ban a user from the universe | `universe.user-restriction:write` | | `unbanUser(userId)` | Remove a ban from a user | `universe.user-restriction:write` | | `getUserRestriction(userId)` | Get a user's current restriction info | `universe.user-restriction:read` | | `listRestrictionLogs(options?)` | List all restriction logs across the universe | `universe.user-restriction:read` | | `listDatastores(options?)` | List all datastores in the universe | `universe-datastores.control:list` | | `deleteDatastore(name)` | Delete a datastore | `universe-datastores.control:delete` | | `recoverDatastore(name)` | Recover a deleted datastore | `universe-datastores.control:delete` | ## Datastore | Method | Description | Scope(s) Required | |---|---|---| | `getEntry(key, options?)` | Get the full entry object for a key | `universe-datastores.objects:read` | | `getValue(key, options?)` | Get just the value for a key | `universe-datastores.objects:read` | | `getEntryRevisions(key, options?)` | List revision history for a key | `universe-datastores.versions:list` | | `setEntry(key, value, options?)` | Set the full entry object for a key | `universe-datastores.objects:update` | | `setValue(key, value, options?)` | Set just the value for a key | `universe-datastores.objects:update` | | `deleteEntry(key)` | Delete an entry | `universe-datastores.objects:delete` | ## OrderedDatastore | Method | Description | Scope(s) Required | |---|---|---| | `getEntry(key)` | Get a single ordered entry | `universe.ordered-data-store.scope.entry:read` | | `listEntries(options?)` | List entries in sorted order | `universe.ordered-data-store.scope.entry:read` | | `setEntry(key, value, options?)` | Create or update an ordered entry | `universe.ordered-data-store.scope.entry:write` | | `deleteEntry(key)` | Delete an ordered entry | `universe.ordered-data-store.scope.entry:write` | @voxov this is current capabilities
